Method–provenance block
Property: Fukui reactivity indices (f+, f–, f0) and dual descriptor for formaldehyde; headline value reported here is the largest electrophilic Fukui index f+.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density‐fitting; exact 4-center integrals) in PySCF 2.x.
Geometry provenance: single-point calculations on the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz (no re-optimization; DFT//input-geometry protocol).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1); cation state +1, doublet; anion state –1, doublet.
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine subcommand `fukui`, PySCF backend).
Convergence & caveats: All three SCF calculations (N, N–1, N+1) converged; integrity.status = ok; integrity.trustworthy = true. Warnings reported by the engine are reproduced verbatim below.
